about.bio.1: My curiosity is the engine behind everything I build. Whether I'm studying token architecture for a multi-brand design system, deconstructing how interaction patterns affect conversion, or mapping the behavioral signals inside a dataset—my mind is always solving. The gaps in my knowledge don't slow me down; they direct me.
about.bio.2: What people tell me shines most: the ability to translate complex, system-level thinking into language that engineers, product managers, and executives all act on.
about.quote.text: Great design systems start with deep empathy for the people building with them—and end with measurable, scalable impact.
about.title: A design systems thinker with a full-stack mindset
about.value.0.desc: Every token, component, and pattern starts with a genuine need—not a visual preference.
about.value.0.title: Systems-first curiosity
about.value.1.desc: The smallest inconsistency in a design system creates the largest friction downstream. Precision is non-negotiable.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Design-to-code parity doesn't happen by accident. It happens through clear, consistent communication with engineers, product managers, and brand teams.
about.value.2.title: Cross-functional communicator
about.value.3.desc: Design systems are judged by adoption rates, delivery velocity, and the quality of what teams build with them—not by how the library looks in Figma.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of adoption, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted marketing campaigns and customer engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin, improved customer retention and subscription renewals, increased average cart size, and reduced friction for entrepreneurs onboarding new customers—demonstrating how thoughtfully applied generative AI and design systems thinking can drive measurable commercial outcomes grounded in behavioral research and scalable design principles.

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative profitability; from a –17% operating margin to +2% within four months through AI-assisted design and behavioral insight synthesis.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals driven by real, actionable qualitative and quantitative insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average cart size and customer lifetime value through targeted omnichannel engagement.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced customer acquisition friction by proactively surfacing needs through AI-driven persona intelligence.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational awareness of customers across ~40 users in sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted persona generation platform built on live business intelligence data. It combines structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights—enabling teams to understand not just who customers were, but how and why they made decisions. Built using agentic AI modeling, MCP server workflows, and design systems thinking to deliver a scalable, org-wide intelligence tool.

modal.project.0.quote.text: This platform fundamentally changed how we understand and engage our customers. Within four months, it enabled more precise targeting and smarter interactions that helped move our operating margin from –17% to +2%, while strengthening customer trust and long-term engagement.

modal.project.0.title: AI Persona Agent
modal.project.1.challenge: Architected and led delivery of a Figma-native, token-driven design system to modernize a fragmented multi-platform experience spanning consumer-facing e-commerce, marketing, sales, and internal communications. The goal was a durable system with semantic token architecture, variable-based theming, and component standards that improved consistency, scalability, and design-to-code parity—aligning design decisions with business outcomes across responsive web and native platforms.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in delivery time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More design deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer hours saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Token architecture with semantic tokens and variable-based theming across responsive web, iOS, and Android—60–90% org-wide adoption.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: Single source of truth in Figma referenced directly in CMS, enabling design-to-code parity across engineering and design teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Component standards and usage principles embedded directly into system governance—UX strategy aligned to business outcomes.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Design system culture built through office hours, tutorials, and mentoring sessions—designer autonomy and velocity measurably improved.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Executive trust established through visible, consistent component standards referenced across org-wide deliverables.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma with variable-based theming and is referenced directly in Contentful CMS. Designers, engineers, and product managers operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence—transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic capability with measurable design maturity.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This new system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Visual and interaction quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: Defined the experience strategy and interaction design for a new membership join flow and entrepreneurial advancement system. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to join in compliance with requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value proposition—without confusion, friction, or mistrust. A scalable interaction pattern library and consistent visual language were required across landing pages, cart, and checkout.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified membership value proposition through consistent visual language and interaction patterns, reducing hesitation at tier selection.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through component standards-driven success states and guided flows.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class omnichannel experience rather than an afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward entrepreneurial participation through scalable interaction design.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable join and advancement framework aligned with long-term retention, growth, and design-to-code delivery.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes membership as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate. Accomplished by aligning interaction patterns, component standards, and subscription mechanics across landing pages, cart, and checkout. The experience is built on a scalable design system foundation to improve conversion, reduce abandonment, and support sustainable growth. Design-to-code parity with engineering ensures consistent delivery across all digital touchpoints.
modal.project.2.overview.heading: Overview

modal.project.2.phases.heading: Project Phases
modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the membership journey and aligning it with subscription-based product engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence—an update that can potentially support both revenue and long-term success.
modal.project.2.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.2.title: Membership Join Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-growth omnichannel e-commerce operation facing critical revenue leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern retail standards positioned this as a business recovery effort—not a visual refresh. Scalable interaction patterns, component standards, and design-to-code parity with engineering were required.
modal.project.4.kpi.0.label: Monthly Cart Interactions
modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Less Abandonment
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Trust in Experience
modal.project.4.kpi.3.label: Target Go-Live
modal.project.4.outcome.0: Confidence-driven cart experience built on consistent component standards and interaction patterns addressing consumer uncertainty.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced checkout effort by eliminating unnecessary steps through scalable design solutions validated with quantitative insight.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Subscriptions enabled as a first-class component directly within the cart experience.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Design-to-code parity with engineering achieved through component documentation and Figma-to-production governance.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Revenue, retention, and trust metrics improved through isolated, measurable omnichannel UI improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring consumer trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart—including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap that aligns scalable interaction patterns with business outcomes and design-to-code parity across all consumer-facing digital touchpoints.

modal.project.4.quote.text: Reframing cart and checkout as a growth system rather than a technical necessity, early validations expect meaningful reductions in abandonment, faster checkout completion, and a measurable lift in membership and subscription adoption—directly impacting revenue and consumer trust.

modal.project.4.title: Cart & Checkout
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and interaction design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external engines to find products—directly undermining conversion and consumer confidence. A scalable, component-standards-driven search experience with AI-assisted relevance logic was required.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results built on scalable component standards.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort through AI-assisted design that guides ambiguous searches rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and interaction patterns.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent omnichannel experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic consumer tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership, and retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer experience layer—not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer and AI-assisted design principles, the new system is built to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users when intent is unclear, and surface recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions across a global omnichannel digital ecosystem.
